hero.title: DIAW // High-Speed Media Downloader
hero.subtitle: All-in-One Social Media Downloader. Extract high-quality videos and images from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and more with zero tracking.
hero.input_placeholder: Paste your link here (e.g., Instagram Reel, TikTok, etc.)

step1.title: Copy Link from Social Media.
step1.desc: Open the social media app and copy the URL of the video or image you wish to download.

step2.title: Paste URL into the input field.
step2.desc: Go back to DIAW DOWNLOADER and paste the link into the search bar at the top of the page.

step3.title: Select quality and start downloading.
step3.desc: Choose your preferred quality and format, then click download to save the media to your device.

footer.description: The ultimate tool for high-quality social media content extraction. Safe, fast, and private. No tracking. No logs.

errors.invalid_url: Invalid URL. Please check the link and try again.
errors.fetch_failed: Something went wrong with the server. Please try again.
